items.claim: Damen Pinez has a significant advantage in striking activity.
items.quote: I still like him to win in my opinion with overwhelming activity on the feet via the strike game

items.claim: Damen Pinez's cardio is a concern for fights going into the second and third rounds.
items.quote: if we go into the second and third round, that'll work against Damen Pasc because he likes to get finishes quickly.

items.claim: Wang Kong has a significant striking volume advantage over Tracy Cortez.
items.quote: You're looking at 30 to 40 significant strike advantage for Wayne Kong

items.claim: Wang Kong has an 84% takedown defense rate.
Luke Riley has poor takedown defense.
items.quote: Luke Riley just 37% takedown defense. Not very good

items.claim: Bogdan Grad successfully landed four takedowns on Luke Riley in his UFC debut.
items.quote: Bogdan Grad took him down four times in his uh UFC debut.
